title: NeoFactory Worldgen
description: My own worldgen for my (WIP) modpack NeoFactory.
body:
![A screenshot of a hollowed out chunk with it's layers exposed overlayed by the logo of the datapack](https://img.exitian.ch/b0LQu4hNmrHVy7R0.png)

# NeoFactory world generation
The NeoFactory world generation introduces a comprehensive overhaul to Minecraft's natural underground world generation.
It modifies the stone and deepslate layers to include a variety of blocks, providing a richer and more diverse underground experience.


## Features

### **Insane overworld generation with default biomes:**

  Complete overhaul to the generation of the overworld. Higher peaks with an absolutely stunning view and insane heights!

  All vanilla biomes!

![Screenshot of world generation showcasing a village in the front with a monolithic mountain in the back](https://img.exitian.ch/thCyVvcfyaZaQyRj.jpg)

### **Layered Underground:** 

  The underground is now composed of several distinct layers, each featuring different types of stone and related materials.
### **Deeper depths:** 
  
  Go deeper than ever seen before! An astonishing depth of down to -192!
### **Taller caves:**
  
  The caves become taller as a result! Some rare worldgen may give you stunningly large caves.

## 🗺 Layer Composition
1. **Surface Layer**
   - **Andesite**
2. **Upper Layer**
   - **Tuff**
   - **Stone**
3. **Subterranean Layer**
   - **Deepslate**
   - **Basalt**
4. **Abyssal Layer**
   - **Netherrack**
   - **Endstone**
5. **Bedrock Layer**
   - **Bedrock** 
The unbreakable and completely flat layer at the bottom of the world, preventing players from falling into the void.

## 📓 How to install
- While making a new world switch to the "More" tab
- Click on "Datapacks"
- Drag and Drop the zip into the folder!
- Generate the new world!

## 📓 Important Notes & Compatability
- There's times where worldgen will generate huge oceans. It's something that I intend to fix in the future. But for now I reccomend re-generating a world until you get a decent landmass.
- Make a new world with this datapack. It is **incompatible** with already generated worlds.
- This datapack will conflict with other world generation mods or datapacks.


---

### Purpose
This is specifically intended for modpacks who like the idea of toying with depth, gating progression through block layers, intending to remove other dimensions.. Or many other things I can't even think about.
